nl_query: What is the average final honorarium amount per board coordinator?
failed_sql: SELECT bc.board_id, AVG(hs.final_amount) AS avg_final_honorarium_amount FROM board_coordinator bc JOIN faculty_cache fc ON fc.employee_erp_id::BIGINT = bc.faculty_cache_id JOIN honorarium_summary hs ON hs.board_id = bc.board_id WHERE hs.approval_status IN ('APPROVED', 'EXPORTED') GROUP BY bc.board_id ORDER BY avg_final_honorarium_amount DESC
